headline: Goldman Sachs Keeps Buy Rating on Intercontinental Exchange (ICE)
summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) is one of the 9 Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stocks to Invest In Now. On June 30, 2026, Goldman Sachs lowered its price target on Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) to $180 from $208 and kept a Buy rating. Goldman Sachs said capital markets stocks are trading at notable discounts due to […]
